query: color banding posterized gradient sky digital artifact
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — color banding in skies, posterization artifacts

response.objective_caption: A deep blue twilight sky filled with layered dark clouds stretches above the black silhouettes of leafy trees and a distant rooftop, with a thin band of warm orange and yellow light visible at the horizon beneath the cloud layer.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily underexposed twilight scene rendered in deep blue and near-black tones, where crushed shadows swallow the textures of tree foliage and rooftop edges and the right-hand tree is abruptly cropped by the frame edge; the stark silhouettes and oppressive darkness evoke a mood of dread and unease.
